description.en: Retrieves the message header plus howmuch lines of the message after the header of message number which. Result is in form (response, ['line', ...], octets). The POP3 TOP command this method uses, unlike the RETR command, doesn’t set the message’s seen flag; unfortunately, TOP is poorly specified in the RFCs and is frequently broken in off-brand servers. Test this method by hand against the POP3 servers you will use before trusting it.
